url.skill:title: Agent Loop Engineering
url.skill:name: Agent Loop Engineering
url.skill:summary_en: A runner-neutral AI coding loop controller that keeps goals, acceptance criteria, verification evidence, stop rules, and loop history in project-local Docs/ files so multiple AI coding agents can safely continue the same development work. Includes Harness Engineering guidance for role separation, rubric evaluation, quality vision, and environment observability.
url.skill:summary_zh: 一个面向多 AI Coding Agent 的编码循环总控 Skill，用项目本地 Docs/ 文件保存目标、验收标准、验证证据、停止规则和循环历史，让不同 Agent 可以安全接力同一项开发工作。包含 Harness Engineering 指南，用于角色分工、Rubric 评估、品质锚定和环境可读性。
url.skill:functions: Controls bounded coding loops; bootstraps TARGET.md and ACCEPTANCE.md; enforces context budgets; classifies environment escalation; writes STATUS, PENDING, NEXT_ACTIONS, EVALUATION, COMPLETED, and LOOP_RUNS.jsonl; defines Done / Done with Risk / Blocked gates; provides Harness Engineering guidance, automation runner guidance, and runner adapter contracts for Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Cline, Qoder, CodeBuddy, Trae, Gemini CLI, Aider, and GitHub Actions.
url.skill:tags: ai-coding, agent-loop, harness-engineering, automation-runner, multi-agent, rubric-evaluation, coding-agent, project-memory, acceptance-criteria, verification, stop-gates, context-budget, handoff, runner-adapters

url.skill:description: Main instruction file for Agent Loop Engineering.
Security and privacy guidance for Agent Loop Engineering.
Project-local Docs/ state protocol for multi-agent loop memory.
Done, Done with Risk, Blocked, and Continue decision rules.
Automation runner guidance for repeated one-loop scheduling, stop-state parsing, budgets, locking, and CI boundaries.
Harness Engineering guidance for Planner / Developer / Evaluator separation, rubric evaluation, quality vision, environment observability, and low-gain stop rules.
Progressive reading and context budget rules.
OpenAI agent configuration for this skill.
